{{nihongo|'''Kawata Shrine'''|川田神社 (湖南市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

鳥居 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|湖南市|Q857194}}正福寺1219 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|01|20.4|N|136|04|28.5|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天児屋根命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）論社
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|一間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|5月1日|Q2544}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=川田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''川田神社'''（かわたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|湖南市|Q857194}}に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内社論社}}で{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}。 === 祭神 === {{jalink|天児屋根命}}を祀る。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代不詳。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』に記載の{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}の論社である。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）10月に村社に列した。 === 神紋 === *三ッ巴 === 祭事 === * 例祭 - 5月1日 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=535 川田神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かわたしんしやこなんし}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名かわたしんしやこなんし]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:湖南市の歴史]] [[Category:湖南市の建築物]]

former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|one-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{jalink|May 1|Q2544}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=川田神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Kawata Shrine''' (かわたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|shrine|Q845945}} enshrined in {{jalink|Konan|Q857194}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. It is a candidate shrine for a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} and its former rank was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === Enshrined deity === It enshrines {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}}. === History === The founding period is unknown. It is one of the candidate shrines for a {{jalink|Myojin Taisha|Q9610964}} listed in the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}''. In October 1876 (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a village shrine. === Shrine crest === * Mitsubā === Festivals === * Annual festival - May 1 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode=view=1&view:oid=535 Kawata Shrine]（Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かわたしんしやこなんし}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Kawata Shrine (Q11479033)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Kawata Shrine (Q11479033)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社|名かわたしんしやこなんし]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:湖南市の歴史]] [[Category:湖南市の建築物]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Need translation]] [[Category:Qsort]]{{DEFAULTSORT:QKawata Shrine (Q11479033)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:QKawata Shrine (Q11479033)}}{{DEFAULTSORT:出羽神社Kawata Shrine (Q11479033)}}
